rewards.desc: Antique hunting shotgun. 2d10 close, 1d10 far. 2 shots, can doublefire for x2 dmg.
Brand new revolver. 1d10+1 Never used. Which flashy attachment did this idiot strap on?

scenes.desc: A spiderweb of tripwires and improvised shotgun-shell/02-tanks traps. A corpse is floating in the airlock, gun in hand. How do you proceed?
Door to the cabin opens: The headless, frozen corpse of the pilot, shotgun on lap. Note: 'I just wanted to help.'. Last ship transmission to 'I.K'

data.summary: A pilot has rigged his docked ship with deadly traps to prevent repo. Smuggled oxygen for I.K. The pilot isn't fighting back; he is floating frozen in the driver's seat (Suicide, shotgun, messy).
data.title: Shotgun Repo
